paragraphs.source: As multi-die designs become the norm, die-to-die interconnects are a critical bottleneck. Major foundries and chip designers presented approaches to pushing bandwidth density and energy efficiency on both organic substrates and with advanced packaging.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As multi-die designs become the norm, die-to-die interconnects are a critical bottleneck. Major foundries and chip designers presented approaches to pushing bandwidth density and energy efficiency on both organic substrates and with advanced packaging.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As multi-die designs become the norm, die-to-die interconnects are a critical bottleneck. Major foundries and chip designers presented approaches to pushing bandwidth density and energy efficiency on both organic substrates and with advanced packaging.

pro.text: 随着多裸片设计成为常态，裸片间互连已成为关键瓶颈。各大晶圆代工厂和芯片设计公司提出了多种方案，力求在有机基板和先进封装技术上同时提升带宽密度与能效。

issues.description: 译文句式略显生硬，存在‘在...上’和‘通过...’的并列结构，可以优化得更流畅。
‘已成为一个关键瓶颈’中的‘一个’略显冗余，可以省略以增强力度。
